report.summary: Steady-state cycle: 556 published pages (up from 554), 4 new learn pages created (virtuals, grass, paradex, perp-dex-wars), 102 TS errors in 4 app files (unchanged), 0/6 API routes have rate limiting, 168 uncommitted files — still awaiting commit+deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 556 published slugs in published-pages.ts — up 2 from prior cycle (554)
4 new learn page.tsx files created since last EOD: virtuals-protocol-guide, grass-protocol-depin-guide, paradex-zk-perpetuals-guide-2026, perp-dex-wars-comparison-2026

102 TypeScript errors across 4 app files (unchanged): lido-v3-stvaults (94 JSX syntax errors), crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4 unescaped >), institutional-crypto-adoption (2 unescaped $1B), crypto-index-funds (2 unescaped >). All are JSX escaping issues, not logic bugs.
structured-data.examples.ts has ~40 additional TS errors — reference-only file, not imported into build
No new regressions detected since prior cycle — error set is stable
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true so these TS errors do not block Vercel deploys
Local full build cannot be verified (sandbox OOM on 556+ page static generation)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (configurable)
All routes implement Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate pattern — correct
Fallback data: only prices and market-dominance have explicit FALLBACK_DATA. trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields lack hardcoded fallbacks — risk of blank UI on upstream failure
CRITICAL: 0/6 API routes have rate limiting applied. Rate limiter exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but no route imports it. CoinGecko free tier (10-30 calls/min) is unprotected.
Cannot test live API responses from sandbox — no stale-data anomalies detectable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
168 uncommitted files: 144 untracked + 24 modified. Includes new learn pages, OG SVGs, reports, globals.css, published-pages.ts
Uncommitted file count grew from 156 (prior cycle) to 168 — still accumulating
No new commits or deploys since last cycle — production is running commit 21aaf5b
next.config.ts healthy: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Middleware: 63 pillar pages hardcoded for premium cache headers + index robots tag
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (no network egress)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta this cycle: 4 new learn page.tsx files created, 2 new slugs added to published-pages.ts
Shipped: virtuals-protocol-guide, grass-protocol-depin-guide, paradex-zk-perpetuals-guide-2026, perp-dex-wars-comparison-2026 (page files exist, not yet deployed)
BLOCKER [P0]: 168 uncommitted files need commit + push + Vercel deploy. Every cycle without deploy means new content is invisible to users and search engines.
Carry-over [P1]: Fix 4 learn pages with JSX escaping errors (lido-v3, crypto-arbitrage, institutional-adoption, crypto-index-funds) — 102 errors total
Carry-over [P1]: Add rate limiting to 6 API routes — rate limiter exists but is unused
Carry-over [P2]: Add fallback data to 4 API routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
Carry-over [P2]: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (pre-existing backlog)
